message.body: what kinda time would you be happy with?

to just redo it when its gone this poorly

I have a couple 4 hour and 6 hour movies I can name but I can't name any 5 hours off the dome

or maybe I'm fabricating a memory and that's just the transgender niche mediaheads on my twitter tl
okay i would not say that
oh i mean so do i

but im kinda consistent at them
but the last jump on that save is just like 25% chance gamble basically

rename your other account to Claire_SM64 so you never have to stream there again
